content.en: Hikers hiked up a tall mountain. It is in the U.S. It is four thousand two hundred meters tall. The hikers were tired and hot.
content.tw: 一組登山客爬上了一座美國的高山，他們又熱又累。

content.en: There was a surprise at the top. It was a big ice cream cone. Huh? No, wait … It was a man! He was wearing an ice cream cone costume. But it wasn't Halloween!
content.tw: 山頂上有個很大的冰淇淋甜筒！不對，那是一位打扮成甜筒的男子！

content.en: The man had a big bag. It was twenty-seven kilograms. It had lots of ice cream sandwiches and ice cream bars! It had dry ice too. This cold, cold ice kept the ice cream cold.
content.tw: 那名男子揹著一個很重的大袋子，裡面裝滿了冰淇淋三明治跟冰棒！為了確保冰淇淋不會融化，袋子裡還放了乾冰。

content.en: The hikers cheered! Ice cream! Some kids ran to the ice cream man. He gave them ice cream. The kids were very happy!
content.tw: 登山客高興的歡呼：「哇，是冰淇淋！」一些小朋友開心地跑去找冰淇淋先生，享用美味的冰淇淋！

content.en: The ice cream man is strong. It is hard to hike up the mountain. It is harder with a big bag! But he hikes up and down the mountain. He hikes fast! Maybe he wants to get more ice cream!
content.tw: 要揹著裝滿冰淇淋的大袋子爬山非常困難。但是冰淇淋先生很強壯，他可以快速地上山又下山！

content.en: Hikers look for this man now. When he is at the top of the mountain, they are happier!
content.tw: 現在，登山客都會期待冰淇淋先生的出現。有冰淇淋先生在山頂上，大家就會很開心！

content.en: Giving people ice cream at the top of a mountain is nice, fun, and very cool!
content.tw: 在山頂上給人們冰淇淋，既好又有趣，而且非常酷！

vocabulary.preface: 高山上賣冰淇淋，東西還要自己搬上去，這個生意不好做!

content.text:
1. thousand 千.
Finally, we're at the top of the mountain! 我們終於到山頂了!
Yay!!! One thousand and two hundred meters! 海拔一千兩百公尺!
How about that! 不錯吧!

2. down 往下.
And look at the great view! 而且你看這個壯觀的景色!
It's all very nice. But we have to go down now.
是都很好，但是我們現在得下山了。

3. tired 疲倦的.
We've just climbed up here! 我們才剛剛爬上來!
And I'm very tired! 我很累呢!

4. fast 快速的.
It's going to be sunset soon.太陽就要下山了。
We need to get down fast. 我們得趕快下去。
Or it'll be too dark and cold.要不然就太暗了，也會太冷。

vocabulary.postscript:
今天的單字，你記住了幾個?
thousand千 down往下 tired疲倦的 fast快速的

quiz.question: 1. What was the man wearing?
options: a. An ice cream cone costume
b. An ice cream bar costume
c. An ice cream sandwich costume

quiz.question: 2. What kept the ice cream cold?
3. What do we know about the man?

content.en: Some shops have lights in front. Some shops have guards in front. They help keep shops safe.
content.tw: 有一些店門口會亮燈或是有警衛駐守，保護店家的安全。

content.en: But in Pingtung, one shop has a superhero in front! That's right, it has a superhero! He is big. He is two hundred fifty centimeters tall! He looks very strong. He looks very mad. And he is very green!
content.tw: 但屏東一家店鋪的門口有超級英雄！它是250公分高的浩克！他又高又壯，看起來很生氣！

content.en: In movies, he walks and the earth shakes! He talks and people shake! But at this shop, he does not walk. He does not talk. He is made of stone.
content.tw: 在電影中，浩克走路時地會震動。他一開口，大家就嚇得發抖！但這間店的浩克不會走路也不會說話，因為他是石頭做的雕像！

content.en: The shop needs the superhero's help. Some people think the shop is not in a good place. Uh-oh … Maybe it will have bad luck. Oh no! Maybe no one will go to the shop! The superhero's job is to keep the shop safe from bad luck!
content.tw: 有一些人覺得這家店的地理位置不好，也許會招來惡運，客人也不上門！他們需要超級英雄幫他們驅除惡運！

content.en: Is the superhero doing a good job? Well, many people go to the shop now. They take pictures and videos with him. So, yes! He is doing a good job.
content.tw: 浩克成功了！現在，很多人會來，跟門口的浩克一起合照！他是很棒的超級英雄！

content.en: Do you think more shops will have superheroes now? Hmmm … Which superhero is best for this job?
content.tw: 你認為現在會有更多商店有超級英雄嗎？嗯...哪個超級英雄最適合這份工作呢？

vocabulary.preface: 石頭做的浩克，結果是招來顧客的辦法。

content.text:
1. shop 商店。
I can't believe it! 真不敢相信 ! They're closing my favorite coffee shop!
他們要關掉我最喜歡的咖啡店!
You mean forever? 意思是永遠關門嗎?
Yeah, they've sold the place! 對啊，他們已經把它賣掉了!

2. maybe 也許。
Maybe they'll open another one. 也許他們會另外開一家。
But I want this one! 但是我要這一家!

3. in front 在前面。
It has tables and chairs in front. 它前面有桌子椅子。
I can sit there and have my coffee.我可以坐在那裏喝我的咖啡。

4. walk 走路。
And just see people walking by? 就看著人走來走去?
Yeah, that's the best time of my day! 對，那是我一天最好的時光!
Then you'll need a new "best time". 那你需要一個新的最好的時光。

vocabulary.postscript:
來一起讀單字
shop商店 maybe也許 in front在前面 walk走路

quiz.question: 1. How many centimeters tall is the shop's superhero?
2. What is the shop's superhero made of?
3. What does the superhero keep the shop safe from?

content.en: Robots can do many things. Some robots make cars. Some fly and take pictures. And some do dangerous things! These dangerous things are not safe for people to do.
content.tw: 機器人可以做很多事，製造汽車，空拍照都行。他們還可以完成人類做不到的危險任務。

content.en: Taiwan has a new robot dog. It is from the U.S. It was 15 million NT! It helps Taiwan's emergency workers.
content.tw: 台灣從美國買了一隻要價一千五百萬台幣的機器狗，牠協助台灣的緊急救難人員！

content.en: This robot dog can work around dangerous chemicals. These chemicals can make the air very bad. And some can explode!
content.tw: 機器狗可以靠近危險的化學物質！這些化學物質會汙染空氣，還可能會爆炸！

content.en: The robot dog can find these chemicals too. And it can find their names!
content.tw: 機器狗不但能找到化學物質的位置，還可以認出不同的種類！

content.en: Sometimes there are emergencies with chemicals. The chemical names are very important to know! Then workers can make the chemicals safer.
content.tw: 發生緊急狀況時，救難人員需要馬上知道化學物質的種類跟名稱，才能採取對應行動。

content.en: Can the workers use water? Well, water makes some chemicals safer. But it makes some more dangerous!
content.tw: 救火時用水就可以撲滅火勢嗎？有時候用水反而會變得更嚴重喔！

content.en: Taiwan will get two more robot dogs. Then it will have three! One robot will work in the north of Taiwan. One will work in the middle. And one will work in the south.
content.tw: 台灣還會再買兩隻一樣的機器狗。這三隻機器狗會分別派到台灣的北中南服務！

content.en: These robot dogs will make Taiwan safer!
content.tw: 這些機器狗將會讓台灣更安全！

vocabulary.preface: 機器狗可以去人類避免去到的危險地方。

content.text:
1. dog 狗。
Look! They’re sending a robot dog into the fire! 你看，他們把一隻機器狗送進了火場!
Wow! Does it bark? 牠會不會叫?
Obviously not. It doesn’t need to bark.顯然不會。牠又不需要叫。

2. emergency 緊急情況。
Of course it does! 牠當然需要。
It has to warn people in an emergency! 緊急情況的時候牠得警告人。
Well, I guess you have a point. 我想你講得有道理。

3. air 空氣。
Look at all that smoke! 你看那些濃煙!
The air must be very bad.空氣一定糟透了。

4. dangerous 危險的。
The dog is coming out now. 狗狗現在出來了。
Did it find anything? 牠有找到什麼嗎?
No. Maybe it’s too dangerous even for a robot dog.沒有。即使是機器狗也可能太危險了。

vocabulary.postscript:
來複習今天的單字。
dog狗 emergency緊急情況 air空氣 dangerous危險的

quiz.question: 1. Where is Taiwan's new robot dog from?
2. How much was the robot dog?
3. How many robot dogs will Taiwan have?

content.en: Taiwan has many milkfish farms. Milkfish are easy to farm. But sometimes they get too cold. Then they die! What can fish farmers do with these fish?
content.tw: 台灣有很多虱目魚養殖廠。虱目魚不難照顧，但有時候天氣太冷，他們容易被冷死！這些冷死的魚該怎麼辦呢？

content.en: A man in Changhua showed farmers how to dry milkfish. The farmers cut the fish from the head to the tail. Then they open the fish like a book.
content.tw: 有個彰化人教養殖業者如何風乾虱目魚！他們把虱目魚對半剖開，就像一本攤開的書。

content.en: The farmers put the fish in salty water. Then they hang the open, wet fish outside. The next morning, the fish are dry, salty, and delicious!
content.tw: 他們把虱目魚浸泡在鹽水中，再把虱目魚掛在戶外風乾一個晚上。到了第二天，虱目魚就變成了鹹鹹的，美味的魚乾！

content.en: The man let farmers hang their fish in his garden. That night, he had a visitor. The visitor came on his scooter.
content.tw: 師傅讓養殖業者把虱目魚掛在他的庭院中。那天晚上，有一名男子騎機車到他家。

content.en: Then his scooter headlight shined on hundreds of big eyes! "Hooo" were they looking at? They were looking at him! The visitor was scared. He shouted "HELP! OWLS!"
content.tw: 機車的車燈照向前方時，有好幾百雙盯著他看的大眼睛！他害怕的大叫：「救命啊，有貓頭鷹！」

content.en: The man came outside. He said there were no owls. The eyes were fish eyes.
content.tw: 師傅聽到他的叫聲後，跑出來解釋那些不是貓頭鷹，而是風乾中的虱目魚的眼睛！

content.en: If you see hundreds of big eyes at night, don't be scared! Maybe fish are hanging to dry!
content.tw: 如果你在晚上看到幾百雙大眼睛，別害怕！也許只是魚掛在那裡風乾！

vocabulary.preface: 黑沉沉的夜裡，吊掛在半空中的魚讓人飽受驚嚇。

content.text:
1. dry 弄乾。
Eeeew! What's that smell? 好噁，那是什麼氣味?
Oh, that's just my fish. 那是我的魚。
I'm hanging it up to dry. 我把它掛起來風乾。

2. delicious 美味的。
Now why do you want to do that? 為什麼要那樣?
You've never had dried fish? 你沒吃過魚乾嗎?
It's delicious! 很好吃的。

3. look at 注視。
But are you keeping its eyes? 但是你要保留它的眼睛嗎?
They are looking at me! 那雙眼睛看著我!
They are not! 沒有看著你。
The fish is dead, remember? 魚已經死了，記得嗎?

4. head 頭部，tail 尾巴。
I never eat a fish's head and tail. 我從來不吃魚頭和魚尾。
But fish heads are good. 但是魚頭很好呢。

vocabulary.postscript: 請來一起讀單字。 dry弄乾 delicious美味的 look at注視 head頭部 tail尾巴

quiz.question: 1. What did the man show farmers how to do?
2. What shined on the big eyes that night?
3. What did the visitor think he saw?

1. dry 弄乾。
Eeeew! What's that smell? 好噁，那是什麼氣味?
Oh, that's just my fish. 那是我的魚。
I'm hanging it up to dry. 我把它掛起來風乾。

2. delicious 美味的。
Now why do you want to do that? 為什麼要那樣?
You've never had dried fish? 你沒吃過魚乾嗎?
It's delicious! 很好吃的。

3. look at 注視。
But are you keeping its eyes? 但是你要保留它的眼睛嗎?
They are looking at me! 那雙眼睛看著我!
They are not! 沒有看著你。
The fish is dead, remember? 魚已經死了，記得嗎?

4. head 頭部，tail 尾巴。
I never eat a fish's head and tail. 我從來不吃魚頭和魚尾。
But fish heads are good. 但是魚頭很好呢。

vocabulary.postscript:
請來一起讀單字。
dry弄乾 delicious美味的 look at注視 head頭部 tail尾巴

quiz.question: 1. What did the man show farmers how to do?
2. What shined on the big eyes that night?
3. What did the visitor think he saw?

title: Nine-Year-Old College Student Studies to Help Kids

content.en: In school, you learn how your brain makes your body work. Some people want to learn a lot more about the human brain. They can study neuroscience in college.
content.tw: 在學校裡，你會學到大腦如何控制身體、讓身體運作。想進一步了解人類大腦，學生可以在大學選讀神經科學。

content.en: Neuroscience is not easy to study. But a very smart kid in the U.S. is studying it. He is 9 years old. He is a high school student. He is a college student too! He is studying neuroscience in college! He goes to college three days a week.
content.tw: 神經科學不是一門簡單的學科。美國有個很聰明的九歲男孩，他既是高中生，也是大學生，每個星期有三天到大學上神經科學課。

content.en: After college, the boy will be 13 or 14 years old. He will study the human brain more. He wants to be a brain surgeon for kids. Surgeons are doctors. They do operations to fix or take out sick parts of the body.
content.tw: 他大概十三、十四歲就會讀完大學了！他想當兒童腦神經外科醫生，繼續研究大腦。外科醫生會動手術，把生病的部分治好！

content.en: The boy wants to help sick kids have long and healthy lives. He needs to study a lot! But he has fun too. He plays video games and soccer.
content.tw: 這個男孩想幫助生病的小朋友，讓他們健健康康的長大。他需要讀很多書，不過他也會玩電動、踢足球！

content.en: This boy says we can do anything when we work on it. Listen to him. He wants to be a brain surgeon for kids. Now he is the first 9-year-old college student to study neuroscience!
content.tw: 這個男孩說只要我們努力，就能完成任何事。聽聽他的話吧。他想成為一名兒童腦科醫生。現在他是第一個九歲就讀神經科學的大學生！

vocabulary.preface: 這個資賦優異的男孩，希望更了解人類的頭腦，好幫助別人。

content.text:
1. doctor 醫生。
Why are doctors smart people? 為什麼醫生都是聰明人?
Who said they're smart? 誰說他們聰明?
They are! Only the top students can enter medical schools. 真的啊!
只有最好的學生才能進醫學院。

2. sick 生病的。
That's not true. 並不是。
My mom takes good care of sick people. 我媽媽很會照顧病人。
She never went to college. 她從沒上過大學。

3. study 研讀。
So she's a doctor? 所以她是醫生?
Not really. 不算是。
But she studied medicine with her grandpa. 但是她年輕時跟她的阿公學醫。

4. listen to 注意聽。
She always said if you listen to people, 她總是說只要你注意聽人講話，
fixing their problems becomes easy. 處理他們的問題就容易了。

vocabulary.postscript:
你想當醫生嗎?來一起讀單字。
doctor醫生 sick生病的 study研讀 listen to注意聽

quiz.question: 1. What is neuroscience about?
2. Where is the boy studying neuroscience?
3. What does the boy want to be?

content.tw: 在學校裡，你會學到大腦如何控制身體、讓身體運作。想進一步了解人類大腦，學生可以在大學選讀神經科學。

fixing their problems becomes easy. 處理他們的問題就容易了。

vocabulary.postscript: 你想當醫生嗎?來一起讀單字。doctor醫生 sick生病的 study研讀 listen to注意聽

quiz.question: 1. What is neuroscience about?
2. Where is the boy studying neuroscience?
3. What does the boy want to be?

content.en: Narrator: A 13-year-old boy took some medicine. Every day, millions of people take this medicine safely. But it hurt the boy's eyes. Boy: Oh! My eye! Narrator: He was in the hospital for a long time.
content.tw: 每天有數以百萬計的人安全服用一種很普通的藥。但一個十三歲的小男孩卻在服藥之後眼睛受傷。他住院很長一段時間接受治療。

content.en: Doctors could not save one eye. His other eye could not see. Doctors tried to fix this eye for 21 years! The man had fifty operations. He got a new eye part many times. But his body did not want to keep them.
content.tw: 醫生們沒能保住他的一隻眼睛，另一隻眼睛也失明了。醫生為了恢復他的視力，努力了整整 21 年！他做了五十次手術，他的身體卻不斷排斥移植的眼角膜。

content.en: There was one more operation to try. Almost no one has this operation. It's very hard. But the man wanted to see again.
content.tw: 只剩下最後一個方法。為了能讓自己看見，他決定嘗試一種很困難的手術。

content.en: Doctors took one of the man's teeth. They made a hole in the tooth. They put a lens in the hole. Then the doctors put the tooth in the man's eye!
content.tw: 醫生取出一顆他的牙齒，在上面鑽一個洞。然後，醫生把一個鏡片鑲進牙齒的洞裡，再把這顆牙放進他的眼睛裡！

content.en: Why did the doctors use the man's tooth? Teeth are very strong. A tooth holds a lens well. And the man's body knows his tooth. His body will keep it.
content.tw: 為什麼要用牙齒？因為牙齒很堅固，可以把鏡片牢牢地固定住。而且他自己的牙齒也不會被他的身體排斥！

content.en: Now the man can see his family and friends. He can see his city! His tooth lets him see everything again!
content.tw: 現在這個男人可以看到他的家人和朋友。他可以看到他的城市！他的牙齒讓他再次看見一切！

vocabulary.preface: 把牙齒裝進眼睛裡面，這可是聞所未聞的手術!

content.text: 1. hospital 醫院。 I need to go to the hospital tomorrow. 我明天要去一趟醫院。 I want to have my eyes checked. 去檢查眼睛。
2. eye 眼睛。 What's wrong with your eyes? 你的眼睛怎麼了? I can't see clearly.我看不清楚。
3. many times 很多次。 I've told you many times you work too hard! 我跟你講過很多次，你工作太辛苦了! Okay okay, now I need to save my eyes. 好啦，現在我要搶救眼睛。
4. body 身體。 Good! Take care of yourself. 很好，要照顧自己。 Your body only comes with one set of parts. 你的身體只有提供一套零件呢。

vocabulary.postscript: 來一起讀單字。hospital醫院 eye眼睛 many times很多次 body身體

quiz.question: 1. How old was the man when he took the medicine?
2. How many operations did the man have?
3. Why did the doctors use the man's tooth?
options: b. It can hold a lens well.

content.en: Student: Let's get out of here! Narrator: Uh oh! Some students are having trouble at school! The trouble is not about their homework or tests. It is about some big birds!
content.tw: 有些學生惹上大麻煩了！這個大麻煩不是考試或是作業，而是一些很大隻的鳥！

content.en: A university in Taiwan has a beautiful lake. The lake has swans and geese. They look very nice on the lake. But sometimes these birds leave the lake. They walk everywhere.
content.tw: 台灣的一所大學有一個漂亮的湖，湖邊有很多鵝跟天鵝。有時候，他們會離開湖邊，到處散步！

content.en: The birds are not afraid of people. But some people are afraid of the birds! So the university tells new students about the birds. It tells them to be careful.
content.tw: 這些鳥不會怕人，但有一些人會害怕這些鳥！因此，學校提醒學生們要小心安全。

content.en: Why? Well, some people get too close to the birds. Then the birds run after them! The birds try to hit them! Student: Ahhh!
content.tw: 為什麼呢？這是因為，當有人太靠近的時候，這些鳥就會追著人跑，甚至是攻擊！

content.en: These birds also take things from people. One day, some swans ran after a student. Student: Go away, go away! Narrator: They hit him. Then they tried to take an important paper. Student: Hey! Give that back, I need that! That's mine, give it back! Narrator: Students go to university for four years to get this paper! The swans tried to hit him again. But the student saved his paper.
content.tw: 這些鳥還會把人的東西搶走！有一天，一隻天鵝追著一名學生跑，不斷地啄他，還把他的畢業證書咬走了！幸好，這位學生最後有成功把自己的畢業證書拿回來。

content.en: So if a big bird runs after you, pick up your things. Oh yes, and leave fast!
content.tw: 所以，如果一隻大鳥追著你跑，拿起你的東西。喔對了，然後趕快離開！

vocabulary.preface: 大雁不怕人，有時候會跟人類過於接近。

content.text:
1. goose 雁鴨，或是鵝。
Have you ever been chased by Canadian geese, Nancy?
你有沒有被加拿大雁追過，南西?
I have, more than once.

2. try 嘗試。
Sometimes when I went picnicking near a lake in Canada,
they would try to steal my food.

3. afraid 害怕的。
Were you afraid of them? 你會不會怕牠們?
I certainly was!
They are big, you know. And I'm sure they can bite.

4. close 靠近的。
So I never let them get too close. 所以我從來不讓牠們靠太近。
I'd run like crazy if they came after me!

vocabulary.postscript:
來一起讀單字。
goose雁鴨，或是鵝 try嘗試 afraid害怕的 close靠近

quiz.question: 1. What kind of big birds does the university lake have?
2. Why do these birds run after some people?
options: b. The people get too close.

quiz.question: 3. What did some birds try to take from a student?
